Release notes for PebbleOS v1.10 detailing new features, improvements, and bug fixes for the Pebble SmartWatch.

# Purpose
Pebble Technology released PebbleOS v1.10 for the Pebble SmartWatch, introducing several new features and improvements. The update includes support for third-party watchfaces via the watchface SDK, enhancements in power efficiency and responsiveness of system applications, and a more accurate battery indicator. Users can now disable the backlight activation by the accelerometer and the vibration on notification arrival. The factory reset function has been updated to remove all non-system applications and watchfaces. Additionally, the update addresses various bug fixes, such as resolving crashes in the music app and email sending over MAP on iOS, improving connectivity with iOS devices, and correcting rendering issues in non-fullscreen apps.
